conclusion: API returns renderable leaderstats + inventory but snapshot is ~11h old (upload/backend freshness). Frontend must render this payload and must not wipe it during account-status merges. Upload freshness requires loader/backend — out of scope for this frontend pass.
frontendFixes: Always cache-bust get-backpack and account-status fetches
Never wipe inventory when status-only payload lacks fish/items
Restore table Actions column with per-row remove while keeping top bulk buttons
localStorageScope: username list + hide-usernames preference only (not inventory snapshots)
